Pre-training for Multi-tasks learning and Multi-queries localization.Pre-training for patch localization, and transformers pre-training needs to integrate.
Reduces decoder layers by employing dense and sparse set based networkIncrease in twice compared to original .
https: //github.com/gaopengcuhk/ Regression-aware mechanism to increase convergence speedLow performance in detecting small objects.
https: / /github.com/Edward-/TSP-Detection Deals with issues of Hungarian loss and the cross-attention mechanism of .Uses proposals in and feature points in as in -based detectors.
ub.com/Atten4Vis/ConditionalDETR Conditional queries remove dependency on content embeddings and ease the training.Performs beter than and deformable- for stronger backbones.
Pure transformer network without backbone.Low performance on small objects.
Sampling module provides foreground and a small quantity of background features.Breaks 2d spatial structure by taking foreground tokens and reducing background tokens.
Dynamic attention provides small feature resolution and improves training convergence.Still dependent on networks as convolution-based encoder and an ROI-based decoder.
Convert pre-trained on dataset into Object detector.Pre-trained still needs improvements as it requires long training epochs.
htps://github.c om/megvii-research/AnchorDETR Object queries as anchor points that predict multiple objects at one position.Consider queries as 2D anchor points which ignore object scale.
Spare- https: //github.com/kakaobrain/sparse-detr Improve performance by updating tokens referenced by the decoder.Performance is strongly dependent on the backbone specifically for large objects.
D²ETR baba/easyrobust/tree/main/ddetr Decoder-only transformer network to reduce computational cost.Decreases computation comlexity significantly but has low performance on small objects.
https: // github.com/encounter1997/ Pre-Training of the encoder-only transformer.Low performance on large objects.
Refine coarse features to improve localization accuracy of small objects.Addition of three new modules increase network size.
https: // github.com/IDEA-Research/ Anchor-boxes as queries, attention for different scale objects.Positional prior for only foreground objects.
